app.name: CoraLibrary
app.tagline: The Modern Library OS for Southeast Asia

catalog.no_results: No records found. Try a different keyword.

account.current_loans_desc: View books you currently have checked out and their due dates
account.reservations_desc: Track items you've reserved that are on hold or waiting
account.browse_catalog_desc: Search and discover new titles in the library collection

reader.unsupported_desc: This file format cannot be displayed in the browser.

landing.hero_subtitle: Catalog. Circulate. Go Digital. All in One.
landing.hero_description: Built for Cambodian and regional libraries.
landing.cta_note: No credit card required. Free up to 500 titles.
landing.features_tagline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.features_tagline_desc: Built for modern libraries with features that actually matter.
landing.features_subtitle: One platform for physical collections, digital resources, and patron services.
landing.feature_cataloging_desc: MARC21-inspired catalog for books, eBooks, journals, theses, audio, video, and more.
landing.feature_circulation_desc: Checkout, returns, renewals, reservations, fines — all in one barcode-driven workflow.
landing.feature_elibrary_desc: Built-in PDF and ePub reader, plus digital access control and access logs.
landing.feature_patrons_desc: Self-registration, membership categories, loan history, and overdue notices.
landing.feature_analytics_desc: Circulation stats, collection analysis, digital usage, and overdue reports.
landing.feature_multibranch_desc: Manage multiple locations, collections, and loan rules from one admin panel.
landing.how_step1_desc: Create your account and choose your plan. Your subdomain is ready instantly.
landing.how_step2_desc: Upload CSV, scan ISBNs, or add records manually. Auto-fill from Open Library.
landing.how_step3_desc: Staff and patrons get immediate access. OPAC is public from day one.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you grow.
landing.cta_final_subtitle: Join hundreds of libraries worldwide using Alpha eLibrary to serve their communities better.

home.hero_title: Manage Your Library in the Cloud
home.hero_subtitle: Integrated Library System + eLibrary for Southeast Asia
home.hero_description: Modern cataloging, circulation, and digital resources — all in one platform. Built for Cambodia, Thailand, Vietnam, and beyond.
home.cta_note: No credit card required • 14-day free trial • Cancel anytime
home.feature_ai_search_desc: Natural language queries, autocomplete, and smart recommendations.
home.feature_multiformat_desc: Books, eBooks, journals, audio, video, theses, and datasets.
home.feature_reader_desc: PDF and ePub viewer with bookmarks, annotations, and offline access.
home.feature_storage_desc: Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, DigitalOcean, Wasabi, GCS, or custom.
home.feature_themes_desc: Pre-built color schemes for your library's brand.
home.feature_multilingual_desc: English, Khmer, and more languages coming soon.
home.feature_analytics_desc: Circulation stats, patron activity, and collection insights.
home.feature_fast_desc: React + Laravel architecture with Redis caching.
home.feature_secure_desc: Multi-tenant isolation, encrypted storage, and HTTPS by default.

pricing.hero_subtitle: Start free, upgrade as you grow. No hidden fees.
pricing.faq_a1: Yes! The Free plan includes up to 500 titles, 100 patrons, and 1GB storage — perfect for small libraries or testing the platform.
pricing.faq_q2: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq_a2: We accept ABA PayWay, KHQR, Visa, Mastercard, and bank transfer for Enterprise plans.
pricing.faq_q3: Can I import my existing catalog?
pricing.faq_a3: Yes! Upload CSV files, use ISBN auto-fill from Open Library, or contact us for bulk import assistance.
pricing.faq_a4: All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.faq_q5: What happens if I exceed my limits?
pricing.faq_a5: We'll notify you and offer an easy upgrade path. Your library won't be disrupted.
pricing.faq_a6: Yes! Each library has its own isolated database. Your data is never shared with other tenants.

about.hero_subtitle: Cambodia's first AI-native library management platform
about.story_p1: CoraLibrary was born from a simple observation: libraries in Southeast Asia were stuck using outdated software that was expensive, difficult to use, and built for Western institutions.
about.story_p2: We set out to build something better — a modern, cloud-based library system designed specifically for Cambodian, Thai, Vietnamese, and regional libraries. Our platform combines the best of traditional library science with cutting-edge technology like AI-powered search, cloud storage, and real-time analytics.
about.story_p3: Built by Corasoft in Phnom Penh, CoraLibrary is used by over 500 libraries across Southeast Asia — from small school libraries to national archives.
about.value1_desc: We believe knowledge should be accessible to everyone. Our platform helps libraries digitize, organize, and share their collections with the world.
about.value2_desc: From Khmer language support to local payment methods, every feature is designed with regional libraries in mind.
about.value3_desc: We work closely with librarians to understand their needs and build features that actually solve their problems.
about.value4_desc: We use AI to make cataloging faster, search smarter, and library operations more efficient.
about.team_desc: CoraLibrary is built by Corasoft, Cambodia's AI-native software agency. We specialize in modern web applications powered by Laravel, React, and Claude AI.

contact.hero_subtitle: Have a question, want a demo, or need enterprise support? We're here to help.
contact.enterprise_desc: Need custom features, on-premise deployment, or dedicated support? We offer enterprise plans tailored to large institutions and government agencies.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us more about your needs...
contact.success_message: We'll get back to you within 1 business day.

demo.hero_subtitle: See how CoraLibrary can transform your library operations. Schedule a personalized walkthrough with our team.
demo.benefit2: See your catalog structure in action
demo.benefit4: Get answers to all your questions
demo.demo_library_desc: Explore a fully-functional demo at demo.coralibrary.com (login: demo@coralibrary.com / password: demo123)
demo.success_message: We'll reach out within 1 business day to schedule your personalized demo. Check your email for confirmation.

registration.title: Register Your Library
registration.subtitle: Start your free 30-day trial. No credit card required.
registration.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
registration.terms: By registering, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
registration.pending_message: Thank you for registering with Alpha eLibrary. Your library registration is currently under review.
registration.step1: Our team will review your registration within 24-48 hours.
registration.step2: We will verify your library information and prepare your account.
registration.step3: Once approved, you will receive an email with your login credentials and access instructions.
registration.step4: Your 30-day free trial will begin immediately upon approval.

features.hero_subtitle: CoraLibrary brings modern library science to Southeast Asia — catalog, circulate, go digital.
features.cta_final_subtitle: Start free. No credit card required.
features.cataloging_desc: One form to catalog any material type — books, eBooks, journals, theses, audio, video, datasets, and more.
features.cataloging_item3: ISBN auto-fill via Open Library API
features.cataloging_item4: Multi-author with role support (author, editor, translator)
features.cataloging_item5: LCSH/MeSH subject headings with scheme tagging
features.circulation_desc: Barcode-driven checkout and return workflow with flexible loan rules per patron category and collection.
features.circulation_item2: Configurable loan periods per patron category
features.circulation_item5: Automated fine calculation with waiver support
features.circulation_item6: Overdue email notices via Brevo SMTP
features.elibrary_desc: Built-in PDF and ePub reader, audio/video streaming, and access-controlled digital resource management.
features.elibrary_item1: Embedded PDF viewer (pdf.js) with zoom/page controls
features.elibrary_item3: Audio and video streaming for media files
features.elibrary_item4: Open Access, Registered, Restricted, and Embargo access types
features.elibrary_item5: Digital access logs with patron, IP, and session tracking
features.elibrary_item6: Optional OCR text extraction for searchable PDFs
features.opac_desc: A beautiful public-facing catalog with full-text search, faceted filtering, and patron self-service.
features.opac_item1: Full-text search across title, author, subject, abstract
features.opac_item2: Faceted filters: material type, language, year, availability
features.opac_item3: Record detail with physical copy availability table
features.opac_item5: Reserve items and track reservation status
features.opac_item6: Export citations in APA, MLA, Chicago, BibTeX formats
features.patrons_desc: Full patron lifecycle management with categories, membership expiry, and loan history.
features.patrons_item1: 5 built-in categories: Student, Faculty, Staff, Public, VIP
features.patrons_item5: Loan history and active reservation tracking
features.patrons_item6: Khmer name support for Cambodian patrons
features.reports_desc: Actionable insights into circulation patterns, collection usage, and digital access statistics.
features.reports_item1: Daily circulation statistics (loans, returns, new patrons)
features.reports_item2: Overdue reports with patron contact details
features.reports_item3: Collection analysis by material type and DDC class
features.reports_item5: Acquisition order tracking and budget summaries

footer.description: A modern library management system — free, searchable, and accessible to everyone.
